creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #12)

According to dmesg and rc.conf iwm(4) is used.  Not sure what you think about wireless here.

I'd start ditching all the tuning and see if the system survives and then maybe go back and put parts of it in and bissect that.  As said, that is, unless there is a crash dump avail to see why it actually panics.
